widget.title: Aurya Setup
widget.complete_subtitle: All done. You can remove this widget from your dashboard.
widget.error_generic: Please retry in a few seconds.

cashflow_monitor.title: Cashflow Monitor
cashflow_monitor.description: Track income, expenses and cash flow.

commerce.title: Storefront & Sales
commerce.description: Sell online: products, orders, Stripe and fulfillment.

customers_light.title: Customers Light
customers_light.description: Understand who your best customers are.

ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: Ask for insights and receive periodic digests.

verify_email.title: Verify your email address
verify_email.body: Confirm your email to unlock all Aurya features.

brand_identity.title: Customise your brand
brand_identity.body: Upload a logo and pick your store's colors.
brand_identity.hint: It only takes 2 minutes and immediately lifts the customer experience.

upload_first_data.title: Upload your first cashflow data
upload_first_data.body: See KPIs tailored to your business right away.
upload_first_data.hint: Start with sales: it's the simplest table. You can import a CSV/Excel if you have one handy.

first_alert.title: Set up your first email alert
first_alert.body: Get notified when a KPI crosses a threshold.

identity.title: Set your store identity
identity.body: Store name and contact email are visible to your customers.

first_product.title: Create your first product
first_product.body: Configure a product ready for sale.
first_product.hint: Fill in price, description and a photo to take it live straight away.

email_sender.title: Configure the email sender
email_sender.body: The name and address that emails go out from to your customers.

stripe_connect.title: Connect Stripe to take payments
stripe_connect.body: Required to receive direct payments from customers.

publish_storefront.title: Publish your storefront
publish_storefront.body: Make your store publicly visible and reachable.

first_order.title: Receive your first order
first_order.body: You have three ways to handle orders: pick what suits you.
first_order.hint: Manual entry (no payment), CSV import, or automated orders via Stripe.

first_chat.title: Try the AI chat
first_chat.body: Ask your assistant a question to discover what it can do.
